top_items.title: Workspace audit logs: New functionality and expanded event fields
top_items.one_liner: Enhancements to Workspace audit logs improve filtering and integration with Google SecOps, benefiting security investigations and SIEM modernization.

top_items.title: Google Cloud and NVIDIA expand AI innovation across industries at GTC 2026
top_items.one_liner: Google Cloud and NVIDIA expand AI innovation, focusing on optimized infrastructure for agentic AI and MoE architectures.

top_items.title: Anthropic gives Claude shared context across Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint, enabling reusable workflows in multiple applications - VentureBeat
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's Claude gains shared context across Excel and PowerPoint, enabling reusable workflows across Microsoft applications.
